meaning: n.同盟者,同盟国adj.同盟的,联合的vt.vi.(使)联盟,(使)联合,同伙,帮凶
examples: Finally the Confederate army had to surrender, ending the war in May, 1865.
The Sons of Confederate Veterans held a public conference of carefully selected scholars to "reassess" the legacy of Lincoln.
Only recently have some Civil War historians begun to make Unionists and their experiences, rather than the Confederate state, the center of inquiry.
Across the top two thirds of the painting is the futile advance by the Confederate forces.
Had they done so, the initial Confederate assault would not have been so deadly.
